$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/change.log.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/change.log.text:
''v0.0.33'' -  2020-06-056

* Timezone bugfix for Date display and time tiddlers 

''v0.0.30'' -  2020-06-04

* Splitting code to multiple tiddlers
* Adding parsedate widget
* Standardizing entry times by timestamp
* You can now change the format by editing $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/dateformat
* Enhanced tasks handling
* all pending tasks now show in a dedicated tab
* Fixed bug of icon being shown always selected

''v0.0.20'' -  2020-05-16

* Added support for simple Todo items by writing /todo command to the input box

''v0.0.18'' -  2020-05-13

* Added toolbar button for easy access (enable it from the control panel)
* Minor but fixes

''v0.0.15'' -  2020-05-11

* Visual Tweaks
* inline Edit of entries

''v0.0.11'' -  2020-05-11

* Recoded from scratch
* Cleaner code
* Delete Icon just shows on hover
* Different Icons for expanded and non expanded entries
* Cleaner Daily Note tiddler easier to manually edit 

''v0.0.6'' -  2020-05-10

* Added a way to see older Daily Notes

''v0.0.4'' -  2020-05-10

* Initial Release
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/change.log.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/change.log

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/readme.text:
[[Daily Notes|https://github.com/akhater/Daily-Notes-for-TW5]] brings  interstitial journaling to TiddlyWiki

''Usage''

* Keyboard shortcut Alt+Q by default
* Create a tiddler and put the below in it to show the interface without shortcut (e.g. for mobile use)
** `` {{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/ui/capture}} ``
* To add a todo item simply add ``/todo`` to your entry
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/readme.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/readme

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/stylesheet.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/stylesheet

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/buttons/open-Da.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/buttons/open-Da.text: \whitespace trim \define DailyNotes-button() <$button tooltip="Open Daily Notes" aria-label="Open Daily Notes" class="""$(tv-config-toolbar-class)$"""> <$action-navigate $to="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/ui/capture"/> <$action-deletetiddler $tiddler="$:/temp/DN-Source"/> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> {{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/images/journal-icon}} <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> <$text text="Open Daily Notes"/> \end <>
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/buttons/open-Da.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/buttons/open-DailyNotes
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/buttons/open-Da.caption: {{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/images/journal-icon}} Daily Notes

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/images/journal-.text:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="tc-image-tag-button tc-image-button" width="20pt" height="20pt" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><g fill-rule="evenodd">
  <path d="M2 1.5v17A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 3.5 20H5V0H3.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 2 1.5zM16 0H6v20h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2a2 2 0 0 0-2-2zm-3 8H8V7h5zm3-2H8V5h8z"/>
</svg>
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/images/journal-.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/images/journal-icon

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions.text:
\define listNotTodo()
<>
\end \define show-deleteButton() <$button class=<> tooltip="Delete Entry" set={{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection}} setTo={{{ [splitjoin[]] }}} > {{$:/core/images/delete-button}} \end \define start-entryEdit() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/DN-editEntry/$(entryData)$" text="$(entryTime)$~$(entryAction)$$(entryData)$" /> \end \define end-entryEdit() <$set name=edittedEntry tiddler="$:/temp/DN-editEntry/$(entryData)$"> <$set name="trimmedEdittedEntry" value={{{ [trim[]] }}} > <$action-setfield $tiddler={{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection}} $field="text" $value={{{ [splitjoin] }}} /> \end \define show-editButton() <$vars state=<> > <$checkbox tiddler=<> field="text" checked="edit" unchecked="" uncheckactions=<> checkactions=<> class="DN-check-edit">{{$:/core/images/edit-button}} <$reveal state=<> type="match" text="edit">
<$edit-text tiddler="$:/temp/DN-editEntry/$(entryData)$" field="text" class="tc-edit-texteditor" tag=input />
\end \define DN_ifTiddlerNotExists() <$button class=<> tooltip="Expand Entry" > {{$:/core/images/clone-button}} <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<> text="""[[$(today)$]] @ $(entryTime)$""" /> <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-edit-tiddler" $param=<> /> <> <> <> <>
\end \define DN_ifTiddlerExists() <$list filter="[title] +[has[title]]" emptyMessage=<> > <$button class=<> tooltip="Zoom to Entry" > {{$:/core/images/link}} <$action-navigate $to=<> /> <> <$reveal type="match" state="$:/temp/DN-Source" text=<> > <> <$reveal type="nomatch" state="$:/temp/DN-Source" text=<> > <> <> <>
\end \define show-entryData() <$list filter="[!is[blank]]" > <> <> \end \define get-updatedText() $(currentContent)$$(lf)$''<>''~$(add)$
\define entry-notTodo() <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text=<> /> <$fieldmangler tiddler=<> > <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-add-tag" $param="DailyNotes" /> <$action-deletefield $tiddler="$:/temp/Append" newEntry /> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection" text=<> /> \end \define selectDayActions() <$action-deletetiddler $tiddler="$:/temp/DN-Source"/> \end
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/macros/global.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/macros/global.text:
\define entryLinkBack(day,time)
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
<$action-navigate $to="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/ui/capture" />
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection" text=$day$/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/DN-Source" text="$time$" />
$day$
</$button> @ $time$
\end


\define dn-ts(timestamp)
<$parsedate name=td timestamp=$timestamp$ format="[UTC]YYYY0MM0DD">
<$set name=entryTime value={{{ [title<get-tmTiddler>getindex<__timestamp__>] }}} }>
<<entryTime>>
</$set>
</$parsedate>
\end


\define get-tmTiddler()  $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-timeTiddler/$(td)$
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/macros/global.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/macros/global

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/variables.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/variables.text:
\define get-origEntry() $(lf)$$(entryTime)$~$(entryAction)$$(entryData)$
\define get-edittedEntry() $(lf)$$(trimmedEdittedEntry)$
\define get-TodoIndex() $(today)$~$(entryTime)$$(entryData)$ \define get-TodoAdd() /todo $(add)$ \define get-timeTiddler() $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-timeTiddler/$(todayUTC)$ \define get-dateformat() $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/dateformat \define UTCdateformat() [UTC]$(dateformat)$
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/variables.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/variables

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/viewEntries.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/viewEntries.text:
\define displayNewFormat() \end

Entries of the: <$select tiddler="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection" default="" actions=<> > <$list filter='[all[]tag[DailyNotes]!sort[title]]' variable="DNTiddler"> <$list filter="[split[-]nth[2]]" emptyMessage=<> >

<$set name=currentContent tiddler=<> > <$set name=Content tiddler={{$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection}} emptyValue="" > <$list filter="[split[
]!is[blank]]" variable="entry"> <$vars entryTime={{{ [split[~]first[]trim[]] }}} entryData={{{ [split[~]butfirst[]trim[]] }}} > <$list filter="[regexp[/todo(?i)]]" variable=result emptyMessage=<> > <$vars entryData = {{{ [split[/todo]trim[]join[]trim[]] }}} entryAction="/todo ">
<>
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/viewEntries.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/viewEntries
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/viewEntries.caption: Previous Entries

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/captureEntries.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/captureEntries.text:
<$view tiddler=<> field=title format=date template=<> /> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Manually edit Today's notes">{{$:/core/images/edit-button}}<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-edit-tiddler" $param=<> />

<$keyboard key="enter"> <$edit-text class="dn-input input-large" tiddler="$:/temp/Append" field="newEntry" placeholder="Free your mind, dump it here..." focus="true"/> <$vars timestamp=<> > <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> $index=<> $value=<> /> <$set name=currentContent tiddler=<> > <$set name="add" value={{{ [{$:/temp/Append!!newEntry}trim[]] }}} > <$list filter="[regexp[/todo(?i)]]" variable=result emptyMessage=<> > <$vars add = {{{ [split[/todo]trim[]join[ ]trim[]] }}}> <$vars add=<> > <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text=<> /> <$fieldmangler tiddler=<> > <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-add-tag" $param="DailyNotes" /> <$action-deletefield $tiddler="$:/temp/Append" newEntry /> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/DN-Selection" text=<> /> <>
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/captureEntries.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/captureEntries

$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions/todo.creator: akhater
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions/todo.text:
\define TiddlerTasksStatus() $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/Tasks/Status/$(entrymnth)$ \define TiddlerinboxTasksList() $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/Tasks/Lists/inbox \define DN-todo-add() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="pending" $subfilter=<> /> \end \define DN-todo-checkbox(isTodoTab:"false") <$list filter="""[<__isTodoTab__>match[true]]"""> <$set name=entryts value=<> > <$wikify name="entrymnth" text="""<$view tiddler=<> field=title format=date template=YYYY0MM />"""> <$checkbox tiddler=<> index=<> checked="done" unchecked="pending" default="pending" checkactions=<> uncheckactions=<> > <$list filter="""[<__isTodoTab__>match[false]]""" variable=entryts> <$set name=entryts filter="[split[dn-ts ]butfirst[]] +[removesuffix[>>'']]" > <$wikify name="entrymnth" text="""<$view tiddler=<> field=title format=date template=YYYY0MM />"""> <$checkbox tiddler=<> index=<> checked="done" unchecked="pending" default="pending" checkactions=<> uncheckactions=<> > \end \define DN-todo-done() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="pending" $subfilter=-$(entryts)$ /> <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="done" $subfilter=$(entryts)$ /> \end \define DN-todo-undone() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="pending" $subfilter=$(entryts)$ /> <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="done" $subfilter=-$(entryts)$ /> \end \define get-todoEntry() <$wikify name="entryTiddler" text="""<$view tiddler=<> field=title format=date template=YYYY0MM0DD />"""> <$set name=Content tiddler=<> emptyValue="" > <$list filter="[split[
]!is[blank]]" variable="entry"> <$vars entryTime={{{ [split[~]first[]trim[]] }}} entryData={{{ [split[~]butfirst[]trim[]] }}} > <$set name=entryts filter="[split[dn-ts ]butfirst[]] +[removesuffix[>>'']]"> <$list filter="[match]"> <$vars entryData = {{{ [split[/todo]trim[]join[]trim[]] }}} > <> \end
$:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions/todo.title: $:/ak/plugins/DailyNotes/functions/todo
